name: Nectarines and Raspberries with Biscotti Crum
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the nectarines into a large bowl.
2. Add the berries to the bowl with the sliced nectarines.
3. Add sugar and almond extract (if using) and mix well.
4. Allow the fruits to stand for 10 to 15 minutes to develop juices.
5. Stir in the biscotti crumbs.
6. Divide the fruit mixture among 6 serving dishes.
Makes 6 servings.
